prompt: How do I add a brand-new R-Ladies chapter to the website?
assertions: Says to create a data/chapters/<country-state-city>.json file (filename becomes the URL)
Mentions the status field, and that only 'active' shows on the world map
Mentions the urlname field (the meetup.com slug used to fetch events)
Notes an optional chapter image under assets/chapters/
Says the JSON is validated (check-jsons) and submitted via a PR
